issues.description: Action sequence is incorrect. The card text describes a conditional action: 'You may trash... THEN set up to 1 character'. The DSL nests Rest inside thenActions of TrashFromHand, but Rest should target characters with subType 'Land of Wano', which is not specified in the Rest action's filter.
Rest target filter is incomplete. Must include subType:'Land of Wano' to match card text 'your {Land of Wano} type Character cards'.
